snippet.title: Katy Perry - The One That Got Away (Lyrics)
snippet.description:
🎵 Best TikTok Viral Music: https://youtube.com/playlist?list=PLBbWAaEu3aidb5XY-CVhuOVK-53HyNPlV

⏬ Download / Stream:

☄️ Lyrics:

[Verse 1]
Summer after high school, when we first met
We'd make out in your Mustang to Radiohead
And on my eighteenth birthday, we got matching tattoos
Used to steal your parents' liquor and climb to the roof
Talked about our future like we had a clue
Never planned that one day, I'd be losing you

[Chorus]
In another life
I would be your girl
We'd keep all our promises
Be us against the world
In another life
I would make you stay
So I don't have to say you were
The one that got away
The one that got away

[Verse 2]
I was June, and you were my Johnny Cash
Never one without the other, we made a pact
Sometimes when I miss you, I put those records on, woah
Someone said you had your tattoo removed
Saw you downtown, singing the blues
It's time to face the music, I'm no longer your muse

[Chorus]
But in another life
I would be your girl
We'd keep all our promises
Be us against the world
In another life
I would make you stay
So I don't have to say you were
The one that got away
The one that got away

[Post-Chorus]
The one
The one
The one
The one that got away

[Bridge]
All this money can't buy me a time machine, no
Can't replace you with a million rings, no
I should've told you what you meant to me, woah
'Cause now I pay the price

[Chorus]
In another life
I would be your girl
We'd keep all our promises
Be us against the world
In another life
I would make you stay
So I don't have to say you were
The one that got away
The one that got away (The one that got away)

[Post-Chorus]
The one (The one)
The one (The one)
The one (The one)
In another life
I would make you stay
So I don't have to say you were
The one that got away
The one that got away

snippet.title: LIVE | [BM] MPL MY Season 17 Minggu 3 Hari 2
snippet.description:
BTRM dan TR masing-masing mencari mata untuk terus mengukuhkan kedudukan di dalam liga. Selepas beberapa siri kekecewaan, mampukah BTRM bangkit memburu kemenangan pertama mereka atau TR akan menjadi penghalang seterusnya? 


AC Esports pula bakal diuji oleh Invictus Gaming yang kini berada di kedudukan ketiga. Dengan kehadiran pemain baharu, mampukah AC kembali menemui rentak kemenangan atau sebaliknya?


Kemuncak malam ini! Rekod win streak bakal terlebur dalam perlawanan paling panas musim ini. Raja Segala Raja bertemu Sang Gergasi Merah. Adakah dominasi SRG akan berterusan, atau RRQ bakal menghentikannya? 


Sabtu | 18 April 2026 
⚔️ BTRM vs TR - 2:30 PM
⚔️ AC vs iG - 5:00 PM
⚔️ RRQ vs SRG - 8:15 PM


📌 MPL MY Arena, Level 6, Quill City Mall Convention Centre
🎟️ Pautan di bio

snippet.title: DIOR大穎 - 靠關係 MUTUAL FRIENDS - (Official MV)
snippet.description:
每一段關係 走到終點的時候
好像就只能靠著共同好友 來得知對方消息

那些接收訊息後
假裝不屑一顧毫不在乎的自己
都是我們必須要走的經歷

無論結局是否如意
曾經的情感 都是真的

在一次次的收到消息後 
慢慢習慣 接受 釋懷
習慣了 再也沒有交集
接受了 人生難免會有的不如預期
釋懷了 一切曾經一起擁有過的回憶

我在這段還可以靠關係的關係里
一點一點的 學會放過自己



《靠關係 Mutual Friends》

家突然變得好安靜 物品擺放得好整齊
少了個人嘮叨叮嚀  快樂反而不容易

那些美好曾經 畢竟都只是曾經
一切在凋零 悔恨灑落 滿地

今後我們只能靠關係  來打聽著彼此的消息
朋友之間不能說的話題 關於你 不曾再提起
今後我們不再有關係  曲終人散就該關上心
用呼吸來紀念你 失去了才珍惜  回憶終究只能回憶

少了個人嘮叨叮嚀  快樂反而不容易
那些美好曾經 畢竟都只是曾經
一切在凋零 悔恨灑落 滿地

今後我們只能靠關係  來打聽著彼此的消息
朋友之間不能說的話題 關於你 不曾再提起
今後我們不再有關係  曲終人散就該關上心
用呼吸來紀念你 失去了才珍惜  回憶終究只能回憶

人生本來就不公平  
更何況是感情  沒人跟你講道理
淚水烙印過的痕跡  下次學著更聰明
幸福需要一再練習  
幾次刻骨銘心  等一次的幸運
至少還活著 有一口氣 我就還能夠相信

最後我們只能靠關係  來打聽著彼此的消息
想起了我們最後的約定 我還是那麼不爭氣
從今以後不再有關係  
但我還是 真心祝福你
請好好 照顧自己 這次我不在意 我們會有什麼 結局

snippet.title: Street Fighter | Official Trailer (2026 Movie)
snippet.description:
FIGHT! Watch the Official Trailer for #StreetFighterMovie, hitting theaters everywhere October 16.  

Set in 1993, estranged Street Fighters Ryu (Andrew Koji) and Ken Masters (Noah Centineo) are thrown back into combat when the mysterious Chun-Li (Callina Liang) recruits them for the next World Warrior Tournament: a brutal clash of fists, fate, and fury. Eenie-meenie-miney-mo
Catch a bad chick by her toe
If she holla, if, if
If she holla, let her go

She's indecisive, she can't decide
She keeps on lookin' from left to right
Girl, come a bit closer, look in my eyes
Searchin' is so wrong, I'm Mr. Right

You seem like the type to love 'em and leave 'em
And disappear right after the song
So give me the night to show you, hold you

Shawty is a eenie-meenie-miney-mo lover
Shawty is a eenie-meenie-miney-mo lover, oh

snippet.title: GODZILLA MINUS ZERO | First Look Teaser
snippet.description:
GODZILLA MINUS ZERO
VFX, Written, and Directed by Takashi Yamazaki
In theatres November 6
Follow @godzilla_toho and @GKIDSfilms for more updates!
godzillaminuszero.com

GODZILLA MINUS ZERO picks up in 1949, two years after the tumultuous events of Godzilla Minus One, and continues the story of the Shikishima family as they face an all-new calamity. Additionally confirmed out of CinemaCon, Ryunosuke Kamiki, the hero who faced Godzilla’s terror in Godzilla Minus One, returns as Koichi Shikishima, and is joined by Minami Hamabe as Noriko Oishi, who miraculously survived Godzilla’s first attack on Tokyo.

As a project Filmed For IMAX, GODZILLA MINUS ZERO was shot with high-definition digital cameras certified by IMAX, and optimized in sound and imagery unique to IMAX screens. Fans can look forward to seeing Godzilla presented to all new terrifying heights, making GODZILLA MINUS ZERO in a true cinematic event not to be missed.

snippet.title: EzHaRHaNzE - Dari Bawah (Official Audio + Lyric Video)
snippet.description:
Ada benda kita simpan…
tak semua orang nampak, tak semua orang faham.
.
Kadang kita nampak kuat,
padahal dalam diam sedang lawan macam-macam.
.
Lagu ni bukan sekadar bunyi…
ini rasa yang tak sempat diluahkan,
ini cerita yang mungkin sama dengan hidup kau.
.
Kalau kau pernah jatuh,
pernah penat,
tapi masih terus jalan…
ini untuk kau.
.
Terima kasih sebab dengar sampai habis 🤍🙏🏻
.
.
#Ezharhanze #FYPMalaysia #ViralMalaysia #LaguJiwa #UntukKau #CeritaHidup #DalamDiam #RasaIni #LaguBaru #MusicMalaysia #SupportLocal #IndieArtist #LocalArtist #LaguSedih #LaguFeeling #DeepFeeling #RealTalk #KisahHidup #HidupIni #JiwaKacau #LuahanHati #Lagu2026 #YouTubeMusic #MusicVideo #TrendingNow #ForYou #FYP #MalaysiaMusic #RasaYangSama #KauFaham #DengarSampaiHabis #JanganMengalah #TerusKuat #Bangkit #CeritaKita #HatiBicara #DalamHati #KuatDalamDiam #LawanDiri #KeepGoing #StayStrong #MotivasiHidup #PerjalananHidup #SuaraHati #HealingMusic #MusicVibes #ViralLagu #TrendingMalaysia #NewRelease #SongMalaysia

=======°

Yeah…
From the bottom…
Ezharhanze

Aku mula dari bawah, tak ada siapa pandang
Langkah kecil tiap hari walau jalan penuh halang
Dulu orang ketawa, kata aku takkan ke mana
Sekarang aku bangun, tunjuk siapa sebenarnya

Tak pakai cerita kosong, semua ni real talk
Siang malam aku hustle, tak pernah nak stop
Tak ada jalan mudah, semua kena usaha
Jatuh bangun sendiri, baru kenal erti maruah

Hidup bukan senang, semua kena rasa
Telan pahit dulu baru faham nikmat bahagia
Apa yang aku lalui aku simpan jadi bara
Jadi api dalam diri, teruskan langkah ke depan

Aku jalan… pelan-pelan…
Tak tahu… mana arah…
Tapi aku… tetap jalan…
Walau dunia… tak dengar…

Dari bawah… aku naik…
Walau orang… tak nampak…
Aku cuba… hari-hari…
Sampai mimpi… jadi nyata…

Dari kosong aku isi dengan mimpi besar
Walau dunia gelap, aku tetap kejar
Tak tunggu peluang, aku cipta sendiri
Jatuh berkali-kali, aku bangun lagi

Ramai datang bila aku mula naik
Dulu masa susah, bayang pun tak nampak baik
Itu semua biasa, aku dah mengerti
Yang tinggal di sisi cuma yang setia di hati

Aku tak lupa asal, aku tak lupa jalan
Setiap luka lama jadi sumber kekuatan
Dari bawah aku naik, bukan sekadar kata
Ini suara hidup aku, ini cerita nyata

Kadang aku penat… kadang aku jatuh…
Tapi aku ingat… kenapa aku mula dulu…

Aku jalan… pelan-pelan…
Tak tahu… mana arah…
Tapi aku… tetap jalan…
Walau dunia… tak dengar…

Dari bawah… aku naik…
Walau orang… tak nampak…
Aku cuba… hari-hari…
Sampai mimpi… jadi nyata…

Yeah…
Masih jalan…
Takkan berhenti…

snippet.title: INSIDIOUS: OUT OF THE FURTHER - Official Trailer (4K)
snippet.description:
The Further comes for our world. 
Watch the official trailer for #Insidious: Out Of The Further - exclusively in theatres this August.


Follow us on social: 
https://www.instagram.com/InsidiousMovie   
https://twitter.com/InsidiousMovie  
https://www.facebook.com/InsidiousMovie  

Visit our site: https://insidious.movie 
Subscribe for more exclusive content: https://www.youtube.com/sonypictures 

Having earned over $740 million at the global box office, the Insidious franchise returns with a new family and a terror that redefines what The Further is capable of.
 
In Insidious: Out of the Further, Amelia Eve stars as Gemma, a young mother raising her daughter in the house she grew up in who discovers she can travel into The Further, the purgatorial realm of lost souls at the heart of the Insidious universe. When something evil comes after her, Gemma discovers an ability that changes everything: she doesn’t just enter The Further, she can bring what lives there back to the real world. Once the demons realize her power, our world becomes their playground.
 
With Lin Shaye reprising her iconic role as Elise Rainier and Jacob Chase (Come Play) directing, Insidious: Out of the Further opens August 21, 2026. Screenplay by Jacob Chase. Story by David Leslie Johnson-McGoldrick and Jacob Chase.

snippet.title: Focker-In-Law | Official Trailer
snippet.description:
The circle of trust just got bigger. Focker-In-Law is in theaters this Thanksgiving. 
 ______  

This November, comedy icon and Emmy winner Ben Stiller and two-time Oscar® winner Robert De Niro reunite, joined by Grammy winner and Oscar® nominee Ariana Grande, in Focker-In-Law, a new chapter in the blockbuster Meet the Parents franchise.
 
Written and directed by John Hamburg, who co-wrote the three previous Meet the Parents films, Focker-In-Law is produced by Oscar® nominee Jane Rosenthal and Robert De Niro for Tribeca Productions; Ben Stiller and Oscar® winner John Lesher for Red Hour Films; Emmy winner Jay Roach for Delirious Media; and John Hamburg for Particular Pictures.


Find Focker-In-Law on Instagram at https://www.instagram.com/fockerinlaw/
Follow Focker-In-Law on Facebook at  https://www.facebook.com/fockerinlaw/
Follow Focker-In-Law on X at https://twitter.com/fockerinlaw
Follow Focker-In-Law on TikTok at https://www.tiktok.com/@fockerinlaw
https://www.fockerinlaw.com 

Genre: Comedy
Cast: Robert De Niro, Ben Stiller, Ariana Grande, Owen Wilson, Blythe Danner, Teri Polo, Skyler Gisondo, Beanie Feldstein, Eduardo Franco
Written and directed by: John Hamburg
Producers:Jane Rosenthal, Robert De Niro, Ben Stiller, John Lesher, Jay Roach, John Hamburg

Insta: https://www.instagram.com/realfoltyn/

Twitter: https://twitter.com/Foltynnn

What is Roblox? ROBLOX is an online virtual playground and workshop, where kids of all ages can safely interact, create, have fun, and learn. It’s unique in that practically everything on ROBLOX is designed and constructed by members of the community. ROBLOX is designed for 13 to 18 year olds, but it is open to people of all ages. Each player starts by choosing an avatar and giving it an identity. They can then explore ROBLOX — interacting with others by chatting, playing games, or collaborating on creative projects. Each player is also given their own piece of undeveloped real estate along with a virtual toolbox with which to design and build anything — be it a navigable skyscraper, a working helicopter, a giant pinball machine, a multiplayer “Capture the Flag” game or some other, yet-to-be-dreamed-up creation. There is no cost for this first plot of virtual land. By participating and by building cool stuff, ROBLOX members can earn specialty badges as well as ROBLOX dollars (“Robux”). In turn, they can shop the online catalog to purchase avatar clothing and accessories as well as premium building materials, interactive components, and working mechanisms.

Up with it girl
Rock with it girl
Show dem it girl (Bada bang bang)

Dance with it girl
Get with it girl (Bada bang bang)

snippet.title: Judika - Sakit Tak Bertepi (Official Music Video)
snippet.description:
Judika - Sakit Tak Bertepi (Official Music Video)
Subscribe channel Judika Entertainment:  @Judika.Entertainment 
Dengarkan “Sakit Tak Bertepi” di semua digital musik platform: https://bfan.link/sakit-tak-bertepi

Judika Nalom Sihotang atau yang dikenal sebagai Judika kembali merilis lagu galau berjudul Sakit Tak Bertepi.  Lagu yang serentak bisa dinikmati di seluruh platform musik digital pada tanggal 8 April 2026 ini diciptakan oleh Yohanes Gerald Bria Abanit (Gery) salah satu personal dari Duo Gery Gany.

Lagu yang diproduseri sendiri oleh Duo Kembar Gery Gany ini menceritakan ungkapan sakit hati dan kekecewaan seseorang kepada kekasih yang pernah dicintainya. Apakah lagu ini merupakan kisah nyata dari salah satu duo kembar ini? Gery menyampaikan, “Lagu ini terinspirasi dari kisah temannya temanku.  Dari ngobrol-ngobrol dan dapat insight baru, jadilah lagu ini”.  Ditambahkan oleh Gany bahwa judul lagu ini, Sakit Tak Bertepi, merupakan hasil diskusi antara Gery Gany dan Judika. 

Lagu Sakit Tak Bertepi dapat di stream atau di download diseluruh platform musik digital mulai tanggal 8 April 2026 melalui link https://bfan.link/sakit-tak-bertepi .

#Judika #SakitTakBertepi #DuaAnakDeo #MusicVideo #VideoKlip #singleterbaru

Hmmm …

Terdiam ku di malam ini
Sendiri ku bersama sunyi 
Dan sepi menghantui hati ini
Kau dan aku tak lagi satu

Meninggalkan semua kenangan indah 
Yang t’lah kita ukir bersama
Kau tak peduli seakan-akan indah tanpa diriku

Oh mengapa
Kau hancurkan hatiku ini
Kau meninggalkan luka 
Dan semua cerita antara kita berdua

Ku akui kau main hati
Tak mengerti cinta yang kumiliki
Kau sakiti aku disini
Kau pergi seolah aku yang menyakiti

Tuhan tolong buktikan padanya

Usai sudah cinta ini
Dan akan ku buktikan bahwa aku yang terbaik
